titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine alumni files24-4-3326
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Laura Finkel

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-12-21 23:12:57 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine alumni files

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. College of Veterinary Medicine

did.abstract: Biographical files of graduates of the Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine was founded in 1894. It was originally called the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Biographical files of graduates of the Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine Alumni Files, #24-04-3326. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

custodhist.head: HISTORY OF OWNERSHIP
custodhist.p: The history of this collection is uncertain. Much of it was created by the college Alumni Association, but it was added to by the College Library staff as well. Other material may have been added from other sources.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to alumni records restricted to college staff only during the lifetime of the student.

controlaccess.subject: Universities and colleges -- Alumni and alumnae.
Veterinarians
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. College of Veterinary Medicine
New York State College of Veterinary Medicine

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1859-1936No class photo; Includes photographsSee also Collection #1806, Kilborne, Fred Lucius papers, 1884-1936

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 18??-1959No class photo; No record of Cornell DVM degree

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1876-1944No class photoSee also Collection #37-05-3378, Dustan, Henry W. Veterinary Class Notebook, 1897

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1865-1931No class photoSee College Deans folder - Was Cornell Veterinary College dean from 1929 to 1932See also Collection #24-02-1677, Fish, Pierre Augustine papers, 1890-1931

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1865-1952No class photo; See also Faculty file

scopecontent.p: 1874-1955See also Faculty file and Collection #6641, Udall, D.H., papers, 1902-1930

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1875-1946See also Collection #6596. Ward, Archibald R. papers, 1919-1914

scopecontent.p: 1880-No class photoSee also Collection #6549, Foster, Robert J. papers, 1894-1958

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1878-1951Was dean at Univ.of California Vet College (1947-48)

scopecontent.p: 1884-1956See also Collection #6983m, Brockett, Arthur A. veterinary miscellany, 1929-1930

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1885-1949See also Faculty file and Collection #24-2-1204, Frost, James Nathan, papers, 1898-1907

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1882-1964Was "one of Cornell's all-time athletes" while attending veterinary college

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1884-1964See also Collection #37-5-3410, Oderkirk, Charles C. Cornell scrapbook, 1904-1907

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Class photo only; From South America?

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1885-1947Includes various photographsFirst woman graduate and first woman DVM in US

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1889-1957See also Collection #6574, Banks, Ray S. papers 1909-1910

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1881-1959Includes various photographs;See also Faculty file and Collection #24-2-525, Birch, Raymond Russell, papers, 1910-1958

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents

scopecontent.p: 1892-1988See also Collection #6547, Williams, Walter W. papers, 1916-1987

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1895-1982See also Collection #6546, Kelley, Francis M. papers, 1910-1969

scopecontent.p: 18??-1981No class photo; REPLACEMENT folder; content incomplete

scopecontent.p: 1898-1981See also Faculty file and Collection #25-02-802, Fincher, Myron G. papers, 1908-1993

scopecontent.p: 1898-1977?Member of class of 1921, but received DVM in 1922
